name: rr-t12-processor
description: Replicate and improve on RedIQ for multifamily underwriting intake: turn raw T12s/operating statements and a rent roll into a standardized, editable chart of accounts, a stitched multi-period operating history, a one-lined rent roll, an enhanced unit mix with HelloData market-rent indicators, lease-trend analysis, and a rent-roll-to-T12 reconciliation — all paste-ready for the TMG model.
